codeReview.summary: Reviewed the feature handoff, transcript skeleton, commit diff, simple-price route/catalog implementation, and targeted parity tests. The change correctly fixes canonical name resolution by matching names case-insensitively at the catalog layer, preserves stable explicit-selector ordering for ids/names/symbols, and adds focused coverage for unknown-selector omission, optional-field gating, equivalent-query stability, and zero-live service-unavailable behavior. I did not find any high-confidence actionable correctness defects in the scoped feature changes.

summary: Pass. The feature satisfies the `/simple/price` trust-slice contract in scope, and I found no high-confidence actionable bugs in the reviewed implementation.
